title: Why did humans create societies, states, and empires from the late neolithic period to 1500 CE?
Exploring Water Quality of Georgetown, Texas
notes: The paper attributed the South Fork's higher sediment load at the confluence to an upstream concrete quarry. While the quarry may contribute, Lake Georgetown dams the North Fork and retains sediment during flood events — the South Fork has no such dam. This better explains the visible difference and invalidates the original conclusion.

title: Research Paper: Proposed Energy Mix by 2050
